steps.title: Compute each power
steps.content: Subtract full periods of $2\pi$. Since $\tfrac{565\pi}{6}=\tfrac{564\pi}{6}+\tfrac{\pi}{6}=47\cdot 2\pi+\tfrac{\pi}{6}$, the angle is coterminal with $\tfrac{\pi}{6}$.

steps.title: Add and identify
steps.content: So $$\cos\!\tfrac{565\pi}{6}=\cos\tfrac{\pi}{6}=\tfrac{\sqrt{3}}{2}.$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
